items.title: No-op Confirmation for OAuth Docs Sync in Clis 🚫
items.summary: This PR verifies that the OAuth documentation changes do not require any code updates in the Clis monorepo. A thorough scope check confirmed that there is no mapped OAuth service or related CLI implementation. The result is a clean slate with no repository files needing updates.

items.title: Fix OAuth secret rotation path in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects the OAuth app operator's POST request path from `rotate_secret/` to `rotate-secret/` to align with the AuthBackend route. This fix resolves the 404 error encountered when using the 'Reset Secret' button on the app detail page. The change has been verified to ensure proper functionality.

items.title: Add OAuth integration guide in Docs 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the OAuth 2.0 'Sign in with Ace Data Cloud' developer guide to the Mintlify docs site. Key changes include the addition of a new guide in Chinese (zh-Hans) and updates to the syncing scripts to ensure the guide is properly generated and included in the documentation structure.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Experience with Quick Start Card in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a 'Quick Start' card on the OAuth app detail page, designed to bridge the gap from app registration to first authorization. It provides a prefilled authorize URL and a token-exchange curl command, making it easier for developers to integrate. Additionally, the card includes links to the full integration guide and supports multiple languages.

items.title: Enhance Maestro Logging and Progress Tracking in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces structured logging for the maestro worker, allowing logs to be captured and queried with trace_id and task_id for better tracking. Additionally, a new pollable progress feature has been implemented, providing a top-level progress object that includes percent, stage, and message, enhancing user experience during task execution. These changes improve operational visibility and ensure that sensitive information is properly redacted in logs.

items.title: Revamped 404 Page for a Sleek User Experience in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: The 404 Page Not Found has been completely redesigned to offer a modern, minimalistic look. The new layout eliminates the header and footer, focusing on a clean, full-screen display with a prominent '404' message and easy navigation buttons. This update enhances user experience by providing a responsive design that adapts seamlessly to both desktop and mobile views.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Open Platform Documentation in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive plan for the self-service OAuth2 'Sign in with Ace Data Cloud' platform, including a new documentation page and an index entry. Key findings reveal that while the OAuth provider is actively used by first-party clients, external developer adoption is currently at zero due to a lack of documentation. The roadmap outlines steps to improve developer integration and visibility, aiming to boost external usage significantly.

items.title: New Usage Card for OAuth Apps in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new 'Usage' card on the OAuth app detail page, providing app owners with insights into their app's usage. Key metrics include total authorizations, distinct users, and recent activity over the last 30 days. The feature enhances user feedback and integrates seamlessly with the backend API for real-time data retrieval.

items.title: Enhance OAuth App Usage Insights in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new endpoint, `GET /api/v1/oauth2/applications/<id>/usage/`, allowing OAuth app owners to view their app's authorization activity, including total authorizations and distinct users. Additionally, the documentation has been updated to align with the code, correcting the maximum apps per user from 10 to 20. A new test ensures the integrity of the usage metrics, distinguishing between total events and distinct users.

items.title: Revamped Voice Call UI for a Sleek Experience in Nexior 🎤
items.summary: The voice call interface has been completely redesigned to align with the ChatGPT Voice aesthetic. Key features include a reactive audio orb, dark captions mode, and streamlined controls for a more engaging user experience. Additionally, internationalization updates have been made across 18 locales to enhance accessibility.

items.title: Voice Call Button Moved to Composer for Better Access in Nexior 🎤
items.summary: The voice-call button has been relocated from the top toolbar to the Composer tools row, making it more accessible for users. This change simplifies the interface by removing the redundant toolbar entry while maintaining functionality to open the call screen. Users will now find the voice button right next to the send button, enhancing the overall user experience.

items.title: Enhance WebSocket Auth with Direct Host in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a direct host for browser WebSocket connections at realtime.acedata.cloud, bypassing Kong's limitations on the Authorization header. The relay now self-authenticates using the actual request path, allowing for seamless integration with both the OpenAI and Aichat services. Additionally, a new route for Aichat has been added, ensuring robust functionality for real-time applications.

items.title: New OAuth 2.0 Developer Guide for Ace Data Cloud in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive OAuth 2.0 integration guide for external developers, enabling them to implement 'Sign in with Ace Data Cloud'. The documentation covers everything from app registration to token exchange and API calls, ensuring developers have the necessary resources to successfully integrate with our platform. This is a crucial step in enhancing developer experience and increasing third-party app registrations.

items.title: Revamp Codex Model Picker to Read Live from Host in Coding Bridge 🤖
items.summary: This update enhances the Codex model picker by allowing it to read the model catalog live from the host's `models_cache.json`, replacing the previous hardcoded list. Key changes include improved model visibility and support for reasoning levels, ensuring that the picker reflects the actual models available on the host. The implementation also includes a fallback mechanism for offline scenarios, maintaining functionality even without a live connection.

items.title: Enhance Credit Monitoring for Our Platform App in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new function, `get_balance_acedatacloud()`, to monitor the remaining credits of our own platform application. The balance is now reported by the existing CronJob, ensuring we receive alerts when credits drop below a specified threshold. This enhancement helps maintain operational efficiency by preventing unexpected credit shortages.

items.title: Default Permission Mode Set to Bypass in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: The Coding Bridge now defaults the permission mode to 'bypassPermissions', allowing users to operate without per-tool approval prompts on their own paired machines. Key changes include updates to the composer initial value, session resets, and wire fallbacks, ensuring that stricter modes can still be applied and persist per device. This update enhances user experience while maintaining security options.

items.title: Comprehensive Architecture Overview for Maestro in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a detailed architecture overview for the Maestro system, encapsulated in the newly added `maestro/ARCHITECTURE.md`. Key features include the agent-native design, the integration of HyperFrames as the rendering engine, and the use of pluggable ACE APIs. This documentation enhances understanding of the system's capabilities, including intent routing and scenario coverage.

items.title: Fix first event drop issue after session re-key in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves a bug where the first reply from a fresh codex session was not appearing in the UI after a session re-key. The root cause was identified as the incorrect handling of sequence numbers during the transition to the real session ID. The fix ensures that the sequence cursor resets appropriately, allowing the first reply to be displayed correctly.

items.title: Introducing flux-2-klein local runner and deploy setup in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates the `flux-2-klein` model into the PlatformService, featuring a local runner and the necessary deployment configuration. Key changes include the addition of a FastAPI service for model interaction and updates to deployment files to route requests correctly. The local runner has been verified end-to-end, ensuring smooth operation within the service.

items.title: Package Renaming: coding-bridge-agent to coding-bridge in Coding Bridge 🚀
items.summary: This update renames the package from `coding-bridge-agent` to the more concise `coding-bridge`, streamlining installation and usage. Key changes include updates to the CLI commands, import paths, and documentation to reflect the new package name. All tests have been run successfully, ensuring that the functionality remains intact post-renaming.

items.title: Updated .gitignore for CodingBridge in Index 🚀
items.summary: The .gitignore file has been updated to reflect the recent renaming of the CodingBridgeAgent repository to CodingBridge. This change ensures that the workspace configuration aligns with the new directory name, enhancing clarity and consistency in the project structure.

items.title: Renamed agent CLI to coding-bridge in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: The `coding-bridge-agent` package has been renamed to `coding-bridge`, aligning the install and run commands in the pairing dialog. Users will now see updated commands: `pip install coding-bridge` and `coding-bridge up`. This change enhances clarity and consistency for users interacting with the CLI.

items.title: Enhance User Feedback for Anti-Bot Pages in Nexior 🤖
items.summary: This update introduces a friendly message for users when a target page is blocked by anti-bot measures, returning an HTTP 422 status. The new message informs users that they were not charged for the attempt, enhancing clarity and user experience. Internationalization support has been added for all 17 locales to ensure consistent messaging across different languages.

items.title: Enhance Realtime API Integration for Aichat Service in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update migrates the Realtime API under the Aichat service, allowing Nexior users to utilize their existing Aichat credentials and universal balance for voice calls. The changes ensure that both the OpenAI and Aichat APIs share identical billing structures, streamlining user experience. Additionally, new tests have been added to verify the pricing consistency between the two services.

items.title: Revamped Skills-Only Approach with Enhanced Video Factory in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a skills-only architecture by removing the MCP dependency, streamlining the agent's interaction with AceData skills. The video factory has been completely rewritten as an artifact-driven pipeline, enhancing the production process with word-level timing for better synchronization of captions and animations. Additionally, a new uploader script has been added to facilitate seamless output delivery.

items.title: WebExtrator migrated to PlatformService in Web Extrator 🚀
items.summary: The WebExtrator repository has been deprecated and migrated to the PlatformService monorepo. Key changes include the removal of standalone CI and deployment workflows to prevent conflicts, along with an updated README that informs users of the migration and deprecation. This transition centralizes the deployment process and maintains the same image name for continuity.

items.title: Clean Up: Remove WebExtrator Submodule in Index 🚀
items.summary: The WebExtrator submodule has been successfully removed as it has been migrated into the PlatformService monorepo. This change eliminates redundancy and streamlines deployment through the central pipeline, ensuring a more efficient integration with other services. The image name remains unchanged for continuity.

items.title: Enhance full-history search functionality in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update finalizes the Phase-2 enhancements for the Suno UX by enabling full-history search capabilities. Users can now search and filter through all task history, including older entries, ensuring no results are missed. The implementation includes a loading spinner and improved user feedback during searches, enhancing overall usability.

items.title: Fix shared nginx-router ingress for stability in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves the 404 error for claude-proxy.acedata.cloud by migrating to a shared nginx-router controller, ensuring that the DNS points to the correct CLB. The changes include modifications to the ingress configuration, which have already been live-migrated and verified for health checks. This enhancement will prevent future occurrences of similar issues.

items.title: Re-sync WebExtrator Worker for P1–P4 Optimizations in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update re-syncs the WebExtrator worker with the latest optimizations from WebExtrator main, specifically addressing the P1 to P4 enhancements. Key changes include improved handling of anti-bot interstitials, browser recycling, and adjustments to timeout settings. These updates enhance billing protection and overall service reliability.

items.title: Enhance Player Navigation and Feedback in Nexior 🎶
items.summary: This update introduces significant improvements to the player experience, including a new visible seek bar, enhanced prev/next track navigation based on the visible queue, and a quick extend icon for easier access to common actions. Additionally, songs now pulse their cover art during loading for better user feedback. These changes aim to streamline the user interface and improve overall interaction with the player.

items.title: Enhance Suno Music Page with Visual Coherence in Nexior 🎶
items.summary: This update brings significant interaction polish to the Suno music page, focusing on visual coherence and user experience. Key changes include a redesigned search toolbar, always-visible play/pause controls, and improved variation badges to enhance clarity. The update also addresses user feedback by streamlining the interface and ensuring responsiveness across devices.

items.title: Fix UI Bugs for Codex History and Session Management in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses four critical UI bugs in the Coding Bridge, enhancing the user experience for Codex history management. Key improvements include enabling resumable Codex conversations, displaying loading indicators when switching sessions, ensuring complete transcript loading, and updating session IDs in the URL for better navigation. These changes streamline interactions and improve overall functionality.

items.title: Fix Codex Resume and Improve History Handling in Coding Bridge 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves issues with the Codex sessions, specifically fixing the resume functionality by removing the unsupported '-s' argument. Additionally, it enhances the history handling by returning the most recent events for large transcripts and speeding up session listings through parallel processing. These changes improve user experience and performance significantly.

items.title: Enhance openai-proxy with shared nginx-router ingress in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update switches the openai-proxy to utilize the shared nginx-router controller, ensuring that the CLB remains active during ingress recreation. It addresses a previous issue that caused downtime for the public URL of the claude-code-proxy. Additionally, long proxy timeouts have been implemented to maintain real-time WebSocket connections beyond 60 seconds.

items.title: WebExtrator Migrated to PlatformService in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: The WebExtrator service has been successfully integrated into the PlatformService, consolidating it with other upstream services. This migration ensures a seamless deployment with no downtime, as the existing image and deployment configurations remain unchanged. Key components, including API, Redis, and worker deployments, have been added to enhance functionality and scalability.

items.title: New US WebSocket Proxy for OpenAI Realtime in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a US-side WebSocket proxy for the OpenAI Realtime API, addressing geo-blocking issues for the Hong Kong cluster. The proxy forwards WebSocket requests from a supported region, ensuring secure key management and seamless integration. Full end-to-end functionality has been verified, with successful audio and transcript handling.

items.title: Enhance Rendering Efficiency and Cost Management in Web Extrator 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces significant optimizations for rendering quality and cost management. Key changes include preventing billing for failed anti-bot extractions, recycling the browser to manage memory usage, and implementing new proxy-ready stealth features. These enhancements aim to improve stability and reduce unnecessary costs for users.

items.title: Enhance Audio and Image Skills in Skills 🎨
items.summary: This update fixes the fish-audio skill by correcting the voice synthesis parameters, improving agent performance. Additionally, two new skills are introduced: gpt-image-2 for generating and editing images, and cos-upload for uploading files to the AceData Cloud CDN. These enhancements expand the capabilities of the Skills area, enabling more robust multimedia processing.

items.title: Enhancing User Experience for Nexior Suno in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update focuses on improving the interaction and visual coherence of Nexior Suno following the feature-parity pass. Key changes include a complete redesign of the search interface, enhanced play functionality, and a more intuitive action menu. These adjustments aim to address user complaints and create a more cohesive and enjoyable experience.

items.title: WebExtrator Stealth Engine Launch Results in Index 🚀
items.summary: The WebExtrator stealth engine has been successfully launched, replacing the previous patchright with CloakBrowser. While the engine is operational and has passed E2E testing, there are ongoing issues with Cloudflare bypass that require residential proxies for resolution. The decision has been made to ship the current version as-is while awaiting further infrastructure improvements.

items.title: Real-time Voice Call Feature in Nexior 🎤
items.summary: This update introduces a real-time voice call feature within the ChatGPT interface, allowing users to initiate calls directly from the toolbar. The implementation includes a mic button that connects to a WebSocket relay, capturing audio at 24kHz PCM16 and enabling seamless playback with barge-in capabilities. Additionally, the feature supports multiple languages and includes necessary permissions for both iOS and Android platforms.

items.title: Fix sandboxing for Claude CLI in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update sets the environment variable `IS_SANDBOX=1` in the worker container, allowing the Claude CLI to run with root permissions. Changes were made to both the Dockerfile and the runner script to ensure that the worker can bypass permission restrictions. This fix addresses issues encountered in production jobs while maintaining local functionality.

items.title: Revamped Agent Layer for Native Claude CLI in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a significant refactor of the agent layer, making it skill-driven and native by eliminating the previous SDK control plane. Key changes include the introduction of a native `claude -p` subprocess, a new video-factory skill, and a streamlined delivery process that relies on file conventions rather than RPC. Several outdated components have been removed, enhancing performance and reducing complexity.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Realtime API Billing Rules in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces billing rules for the OpenAI Realtime API, enabling per-turn billing based on audio and text token usage. Key changes include the addition of new migration scripts, cost models, and API specifications, ensuring accurate pricing aligned with OpenAI's rates. Comprehensive tests have been implemented to validate the functionality, achieving a full pass rate.

items.title: Enhance record endpoint with charged bucket details in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: The `/record` endpoint now returns the charged application's post-deduction `remaining_amount`, along with `charged_application_id` and `scope`. This enhancement ensures that the OpenAI Realtime relay can effectively manage its balance kill-switch using authoritative values, preventing over-spending during concurrent sessions. The change is additive and maintains existing deduction logic, with all tests passing successfully.

items.title: Fix flaky Docker push timeout in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses the issue of failed deployments in PlatformBackend due to ReadTimeoutError during Docker image pushes. By increasing the HTTP timeout to 600 seconds and implementing a retry mechanism for push attempts, we enhance the reliability of the CI process. This change is crucial for ensuring smooth deployments, especially with large image layers.

items.title: Enhance Proxy Support for Stealth Browser in Web Extrator 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces support for residential proxies in the stealth browser, enabling successful Cloudflare bypass from datacenter IPs. Key changes include the addition of the `BROWSER_PROXY_URL` configuration, allowing for optional proxy integration via a Kubernetes secret. This enhancement ensures that while direct egress remains unchanged, users can now effectively navigate Cloudflare challenges with the right proxy setup.

items.title: Shortened Invite Link Text for Clarity in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: Updated the README to enhance the community section by replacing the long invite URL with a concise markdown link. The displayed text now reads 'platform.acedata.cloud', while the full URL remains intact in the hyperlink. This change improves readability and maintains functionality for users accessing the API key and documentation.

items.title: Enhance Registration with UTM Source Tracking in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update finalizes the implementation of growth attribution v2 by capturing UTM source and campaign data during user registration. The initializer now persists these values in cookies, allowing them to be included in registration requests for both Email and Phone methods. Additionally, the IUser type has been extended to accommodate the new metadata fields.

items.title: Capture UTM Cookies and Channel Analytics in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces UTM source and campaign tracking by storing them in cookies for cross-platform registration. A new 'By Channel' table has been added to the analytics dashboard, displaying metrics such as invite counts and rewards, leveraging backend data. The implementation includes internationalization support across multiple languages.

items.title: Enhance Distribution Analysis by UTM Channels in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new feature for growth attribution by splitting distribution analysis based on UTM channels. The `UserAuth` model now includes a `metadata` JSONField, allowing the API to aggregate distribution history by invitee and map it to the corresponding UTM source. Additionally, safeguards have been implemented to prevent excessive data range queries and ensure data integrity.

items.title: Capture UTM Source in User Metadata for Enhanced Growth Tracking in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the ability to capture `utm_source` and `utm_campaign` during user registration, storing them in the existing `User.metadata` JSON without requiring a migration. Both email and SMS registration paths are covered, while OAuth registration will handle UTM parameters in a future update. This change will enhance downstream analytics by allowing for channel-based aggregation of user signups.

items.title: Revamped stealth engine for enhanced Cloudflare bypass in Web Extrator 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the previous render engine with CloakBrowser, enabling WebExtrator to extract content from Cloudflare Turnstile and other antibot-protected pages. Key improvements include automatic identity management for the browser and a challenge-aware recovery mechanism that enhances reliability. The changes ensure more accurate user agent reporting and improved performance during anti-bot challenges.

items.title: Sync Flux CLI with New Model `flux-2-klein` in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the new `flux-2-klein` model to the Flux CLI, ensuring alignment with the latest OpenAPI specifications. The models output table has been updated to reflect this addition, and tests have been adjusted to verify the presence of the new model in CLI outputs. Overall, the command behavior and architecture remain unchanged.

items.title: Enhance Growth Dashboard with Inviter ID in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates the dedicated growth inviter ID into the growth dashboard, ensuring accurate tracking of signups attributed to specific content. Additionally, it documents the server-side funnel queries for better clarity on signups by inviter and channel splits. These changes are aimed at improving the dashboard's functionality and alignment with the Roadmap/CLS.

items.title: Updated Preview Images and Video in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: The README has been updated to feature new preview content. The image has been replaced with a high-quality 3D rendering from NanoBanana, and the video now showcases a clean b-roll from Seedance. These changes enhance the visual appeal and provide a better representation of the product.

items.title: Launch of GA Realtime WebSocket Relay in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: We've introduced the M2 relay for the realtime-voice feature, enabling a GA OpenAI Realtime WebSocket relay that operates independently from the HTTP workers. This enhancement ensures long-lived voice calls remain stable during deployments, with per-turn billing integrated into the existing system. Key features include self-authentication, billing management, and safety mechanisms to handle session limits and graceful shutdowns.

items.title: Enhance access request handling in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves a 400 error on the apply UI by allowing service and policy references to be accepted by either alias or UUID. Key modifications include updates to the serializers and views to support this functionality, enhancing the overall user experience without requiring any migrations.

items.title: Exciting New flux-2-klein Model Added in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the `flux-2-klein` model to the public `/flux/images` API, enhancing our offerings with a locally-run FLUX.2 klein-4B backend. Key changes include updates to the OpenAPI specifications, cost calculations, and the addition of comprehensive billing tests, all of which have passed successfully. This integration ensures a consistent request/response contract with existing flux models.

items.title: Revamped AceKit Guide to Step-by-Step Tutorial in Backend 🚀
items.summary: The AceKit documentation has been transformed into a comprehensive step-by-step developer tutorial based on initial feedback. Key updates include detailed instructions for obtaining tokens, installation, and optional usage with AceData Token, along with three real-world demonstrations. Additionally, title corrections have been made to enhance clarity and consistency across the documentation.

items.title: New Distribution Analytics Page in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a brand new Distribution Analytics page, providing insights for each distributor and our growth attribution view. Key features include summary cards and trend line charts for rewards, prices, and invitee counts, with filtering options for user IDs and time ranges. The page is designed for super admins and integrates with the backend's trend endpoint.

items.title: Updated Service Lineup: Sora Retired, Welcome Kimi, Wan, Grok Video, Fish, and Producer in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: The README has been refreshed to reflect the latest service offerings. Sora has been removed, and new services including Kimi, Wan, Grok Video, Producer, and Fish/TTS have been added. Additionally, new screenshots showcasing the dark UI have been uploaded, and the preview grid has been updated for a consistent style.

items.title: Upgrade WebExtrator with CloakBrowser for Enhanced Stealth in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the CloakBrowser as a stealth rendering engine for WebExtrator, demonstrating its ability to bypass Cloudflare and antibot challenges effectively. Key changes include a fallback mode proposal to utilize CloakBrowser only when current methods fail, ensuring cost efficiency. The decision on OEM licensing and third-party binary acceptance is pending confirmation from the founders.

items.title: Sync Updates for Codex Service in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update reflects a no-op sync for the codex service, primarily addressing modifications to a guide file without any changes to the OpenAPI specification. The investigation confirmed that there are no relevant files or entries requiring updates in the CLI. As codex is a guide-only service, no CLI changes are necessary.

items.title: New AceKit Application Practices Article in Backend 🚀
items.summary: We've added a new article in the 'Application Practices' series, focusing on the AceKit developer toolkit. This document provides a comprehensive guide on how to utilize AceKit for seamless integration of AI capabilities into coding agents, complete with real-world examples and usage scenarios. The content is available in Chinese and has been synchronized with online documentation and translation efforts.

items.title: Refined Enterprise P0 Design for Clarity in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update revises the enterprise P0 design documentation after thorough review against the current codebase. Key changes include the removal of the IP whitelist from P0, rephrasing budget constraints, and adjustments to backend authorization processes. The scope has been narrowed to focus on essential components, ensuring a more accurate and actionable plan moving forward.

items.title: Enhance Distribution Analytics Endpoint in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new endpoint `GET /api/v1/distribution-histories/trend/` to support the distribution analytics chart in PlatformFrontend. It allows users to retrieve time-series data on rewards, prices, and invitee counts, with parameters for time range and granularity. The endpoint enforces strict authentication and user permissions, ensuring data security and integrity.

items.title: Enhance Agent Reliability with Runtime Improvements in Platform Service 🤖
items.summary: This update strengthens the agent-native maestro by implementing features like resume-on-hiccup and stale-task reclaim. Key changes include redirecting verbose command outputs to log files, capturing session IDs for seamless recovery, and enhancing task management to prevent job theft. These improvements ensure a more reliable production environment for the agent.

items.title: Fix Documentation Issues in Backend 🛠️
items.summary: This update addresses multiple inaccuracies in the tool-integration tutorials, ensuring all commands are functional and model IDs are correctly aligned. Key fixes include adjustments to OpenClaw, Gemini CLI MCP, and Codex CLI documentation, enhancing user experience and reliability. The changes were verified against live runs, confirming the integrity of the documentation.

items.title: Launch Plan for Realtime Voice API in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update transforms the PoC for realtime voice into a concrete design document, detailing the rollout strategy and development design. Key changes include a clear API path aligned with official standards, a focus on independent deployment for reliability, and a structured approach to billing and usage tracking. The plan aims to ensure a seamless integration with Nexior for enhanced voice communication.

items.title: Enhance Free-key CTA with Growth Attribution in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the README to include growth attribution parameters for the 'Free API key' call-to-action. The changes ensure that registrations driven by content can be tracked effectively. The brand and support links remain unchanged.

items.title: Growth Execution Roadmap and Dashboard MVP in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the execution layer for our growth marketing strategy, detailing three key workstreams and a centralized launch plan. Key additions include a new growth dashboard MVP for tracking metrics and an updated README to index growth marketing resources. No service code changes were made, ensuring a focused enhancement of documentation and tools.

items.title: New Feasibility Study for Compute Marketplace in Index 🚀
items.summary: This PR introduces a comprehensive feasibility study document for the proposed compute marketplace, focusing solely on research without any implementation or code changes. Key insights include cost and profit estimations for two potential routes: serverless inference endpoints and bare-metal GPU reselling, along with risk assessments and recommendations for pilot testing. The document aims to guide future decision-making regarding the project's viability.

items.title: Streamline Submodules and Ignore Untracked Repos in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the last tracked submodule, OOBEIntegration, from the main branch and adds it along with PlatformStudio to the .gitignore file. These changes ensure that neither OOBEIntegration nor PlatformStudio appears in local git status, aligning them with other standalone repositories. No code or logic changes were made; only the .gitignore and .gitmodules files were modified.

items.title: Documenting AI-Driven Monetization Experiment in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update archives a comprehensive experiment where an AI agent successfully created and listed a $4 digital product in under an hour. Key findings highlight challenges with KYC requirements, payout thresholds, and distribution bottlenecks, emphasizing that while production was efficient, generating demand remains a hurdle. The documentation includes a new section on monetization experiments and a comparison of payout platforms.

items.title: Update Sass to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the Sass dependency from version 1.100.0 to 1.101.0. Key changes include a potentially breaking bug fix that improves the Node package importer's handling of import-only Sass files. This enhancement ensures better compatibility and functionality for projects relying on these imports.

items.title: Updated Community Links and Contact Info in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the README by adding a link to the Discord community and correcting the contact email to office@acedata.cloud. The changes improve accessibility for users seeking support and community engagement. Overall, this is a README-only modification with no impact on code functionality.

items.title: Transforming Maestro into an Agent-Native Video Service in Platform Service 🎥
items.summary: This update completely rewrites Maestro, transitioning from a rigid Python pipeline to a fully agent-native service. The new architecture utilizes a headless Claude as the creative director, enabling dynamic video generation with HyperFrames as the sole renderer. Key improvements include enhanced asset generation, streamlined persistence, and a cleaner API for video creation.

items.title: Enhance message handling with quoted replies and mentions in Wisdom 🤖
items.summary: This update improves the handling of WeChat messages by capturing quoted replies and persisting mentions and context. Key changes include parsing type-49 appmsg XML for quoted replies, enhancing mention extraction to handle special characters, and ensuring that relevant data is stored in the database. These enhancements will provide a more robust messaging experience for users.

items.title: Enhance Claude's Context Awareness in Wisdom Channel 🤖
items.summary: This update introduces significant improvements to the `wisdom-channel bridge` by providing Claude with essential conversation context, including sender details and group information. It enhances the bot's ability to respond accurately by injecting recent messages into prompts, thereby maintaining the flow of conversation. Additionally, security measures have been tightened to ensure that admin access is restricted in group chats.

items.title: Consolidate Multi-Cluster Deploy Plans in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update merges the previously scattered multi-cluster deployment plans into a single directory under `plans/`. Key changes include the addition of three design documents and the establishment of a clear convention for future planning documents. This consolidation enhances organization and accessibility for ongoing and future deployment strategies.

items.title: Retire PlatformDirector Submodule and Capture Lessons in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the PlatformDirector submodule as the customer article-to-video product has transitioned to PlatformService/maestro. Additionally, a new retrospective document has been added to preserve valuable lessons learned from the now-retired brand-short marketing-video factory. These changes ensure that knowledge is retained while streamlining the repository.

items.title: Revamped README for Nexior's All-in-One AI App in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: The README for Nexior has been completely restructured to position it as an open-source, self-hostable all-in-one AI app. Key changes include a shift in narrative focus, enhanced engineering elements, and the removal of outdated links. This update aims to streamline user engagement and improve the overall presentation of the project.

items.title: Relocate FLUX.2 klein-4B Runner in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update moves the local FLUX.2 klein-4B runner to the `PlatformService/winloc/flux/` directory, aligning it with existing patterns in the repository. The new FastAPI service implements the TTAPI upstream contract and is designed to work with a local ComfyUI instance. Key changes include a revised README and the addition of configuration files, while the core code remains unchanged.

items.title: Automate Adversarial Review Process in Index 🤖
items.summary: This update introduces an automatic adversarial review loop for risky PRs and plans, enhancing the review process without requiring user commands. An independent reviewer will now automatically check for defects, allowing authors to address each identified risk through a structured debate. Key files updated include the new review protocol and an updated section in the agents documentation.

items.title: Real-time Voice PoC Prototype in Index 🎤
items.summary: This update introduces a proof-of-concept for a real-time voice communication system that connects a browser to a local Node relay and OpenAI's Realtime service. Key features include microphone capture, low-latency playback, and bidirectional transcription. The implementation is designed for feasibility testing and does not integrate with the main project or billing systems.

items.title: Documenting Shared Nginx Router Ingress Convention in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new documentation section outlining the convention for TKE clusters to utilize a single shared Nginx Ingress Controller CLB. Key changes include updates to the AGENTS.md file and cross-references in the create-service documentation, ensuring clarity on the deployment strategy across clusters. No code or infrastructure changes were made; this is purely a documentation enhancement.

items.title: Boosting Growth Strategies for AceDataCloud in Index 🚀
items.summary: This PR introduces two comprehensive growth strategy documents aimed at enhancing AceDataCloud's marketing approach. The first document outlines a 90-day growth plan, focusing on establishing a hero product to funnel traffic to paid APIs. The second document details specifications for transforming the PlatformPublisher into a self-marketing engine, ensuring effective content distribution across multiple platforms.

items.title: Introducing onepage-pdf for Seamless HTML to PDF Conversion in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates the onepage-pdf skill, allowing users to convert HTML pages into a single continuous PDF without pagination breaks. The skill operates offline, requiring only Python 3.10+, PyMuPDF, and a local Chrome or Edge browser. Key files have been added and modified to support this functionality, enhancing the catalog of skills available.

items.title: Enhance API Experience with Async and Documentation Links in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a revamped 'Run again' button that now requires a credit confirmation before executing, enhancing user awareness of potential charges. Additionally, a new footer button provides direct links to service-specific API documentation, improving accessibility. The transition to asynchronous processing across all services optimizes performance, allowing for quicker task handling without blocking the UI.

items.title: Scale claude-code-proxy to 2 replicas for better performance in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: The claude-code-proxy deployment has been updated to use 2 replicas, enhancing high availability and load distribution. This change is safe due to the long-lived nature of the current setup-token, which mitigates the risk of token clobbering. Future improvements are planned to implement a shared token store for better coordination across pods.

items.title: Introducing the Consumer Module for Article-to-Video Service in Nexior 🎥
items.summary: This update adds the Nexior consumer surface for the Maestro article-to-video service, enhancing the user experience with a new UI and backend support. Key features include a ConfigPanel for source selection, a RecentPanel for task tracking, and multi-language support across 18 locales. The integration is designed to streamline the process of converting articles into videos, making it more accessible and user-friendly.

items.title: Fix kubeconfig user quoting issue in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses a failure in the multi-cluster kubeconfig assembly due to unquoted numeric user and name fields. By quoting these values before they are processed by kubectl, we ensure compatibility and prevent parsing errors. The fix has been verified locally with kubectl v1.32.2, ensuring smooth deployments moving forward.

items.title: Enhance CI for Multi-Cluster Deployments in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new CI configuration that allows the PlatformService to deploy to both Hong Kong and US clusters based on service requirements. Key changes include merging kubeconfig for both clusters, implementing a shared script for context switching, and ensuring safe deployments by defaulting to the Hong Kong cluster. The `claude-code-proxy` service is now set to automatically deploy to the US cluster, addressing geo-blocking issues.

items.title: Enhance Task History Retrieval and TTS Chunking in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the `retrieve_batch` feature to the task management API, allowing users to list their job history in a user-scoped manner. Additionally, it implements chunking for long text-to-speech inputs to prevent errors when text exceeds character limits. These enhancements improve usability and maintain data privacy.

items.title: Boost CI Reliability with Extended Timeout in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update raises the `COMPOSE_HTTP_TIMEOUT` to 600 seconds in the CI configuration to prevent timeouts during the push of large Docker images. The change addresses issues encountered during the deployment process without modifying any service code, ensuring smoother builds and pushes. Overall, this enhances the reliability of our CI pipeline.

items.title: Fix billing and caption upload issues in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses two critical issues in the Maestro article-to-video response process. First, it ensures that failed renders are not billed by correctly reporting the response status. Second, it resolves a 404 error for the captions URL by implementing a proper upload mechanism for the .srt sidecar file. These changes enhance the reliability and accuracy of the service.

items.title: Fix CFR Issues for Maestro Rendering in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses a critical issue with the Maestro article-to-video rendering process that was failing in production due to non-constant frame rate inputs. The fix ensures that each trimmed segment reasserts the frame rate, allowing for successful rendering with ffmpeg 7.x. Additionally, error handling has been improved to surface ffmpeg diagnostics, making failures clearer.

items.title: Exciting New Video Service Integration in Backend 🎥
items.summary: We've successfully integrated a new article-to-video service within Maestro, complete with OpenAPI specifications and comprehensive documentation in Chinese. This feature allows users to generate short videos from articles, with pricing based on video duration and additional language support. The service is now live and ready for use at api.acedata.cloud/maestro.

items.title: Enable Free Polling for Maestro Tasks in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update allows users with a zero balance to poll their Maestro video jobs via the `/maestro/tasks` API. The UUID `553a0038…` has been whitelisted, aligning it with the existing functionality of other async services' `/tasks` endpoints. This change enhances user experience by providing access to previously paid tasks.

items.title: Streamline API Code Preview with Shared Engine in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update refactors the API code preview in the console by removing duplicate code and utilizing the shared engine from @acedatacloud/core/code-snippet. Key changes include the deletion of 15 Mustache template files and the integration of core functionalities, ensuring consistent output across languages. The Java snippet has been corrected to use the valid lowercase `.post(body)` method, enhancing accuracy.

items.title: Enhance API Code Dialog with Run Button and Tabs in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new Run button and Request/Response tabs in the API code dialog, allowing users to execute API requests directly from the studio. The feature enables live execution of requests using the user's API key, displaying the JSON response in real-time. Additionally, the core library has been updated to fix method casing issues in the Java snippet.

items.title: Fix gzip handling for Claude requests in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves a critical issue where requests to the Claude Code proxy were returning 502 errors due to gzip encoding. By forcing the `Accept-Encoding` header to `identity`, the proxy can now correctly handle responses from Anthropic without encountering parsing errors. This change ensures that all chat/completions traffic is processed smoothly, improving the reliability of the service.

items.title: Exciting New Maestro Microservice for Article to Video Conversion in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the Maestro microservice, which transforms articles into videos as part of the PlatformService. Key features include a streamlined API for video submission and task polling, along with a robust worker process that handles task management using MongoDB. The deployment is designed for scalability and integrates seamlessly with existing infrastructure, setting the stage for future enhancements in video processing.

items.title: Fix OkHttp builder method to use lowercase verbs in Common Frontend 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects the Java/OkHttp code snippet generation by ensuring that HTTP verbs are rendered in lowercase, aligning with OkHttp's API requirements. The change involves exposing a new `methodLower` variable in the Mustache render context and updating the relevant template. Additionally, regression tests have been added to verify the correct output for both OkHttp and HttpClient methods.

items.title: Fix static file serving issue in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves a critical issue where root-level static files like favicon.ico and manifest.json were returning 404 errors due to SSR routing misconfigurations. A new mapping was added to ensure these files are served directly from disk, improving user experience by restoring the favicon and manifest functionality. The changes maintain existing SSR behaviors for other routes.

items.title: Introducing Maestro: Your New Article-to-Video Microservice in Index 🎥
items.summary: The article-to-video product has been successfully transitioned to a new microservice called Maestro, now part of the AceDataCloud PlatformService. This service is accessible via the API at api.acedata.cloud/maestro/videos and integrates with MongoDB for storage. The previous standalone PlatformDirector app has been retired, ensuring a streamlined experience for developers and consumers using Nexior.

items.title: Update appkit-universal-connector to latest version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @reown/appkit-universal-connector from version 1.8.19 to 1.8.21. Key improvements include the addition of 'includePayOnly' and 'sort' options to the fetchWallets function, enhancing wallet selection capabilities. The update also includes various dependency updates and bug fixes, ensuring a more stable and efficient application.

items.title: Enhance Talking-Head Videos with Image-Only Input in Platform Service 🎥
items.summary: This update introduces support for image-only face input, allowing a single still photo to animate into a talking-head video. The `prep_face` function now detects image URLs and creates a 20-second clip, truncating any excess to match audio length. This feature has been verified with successful end-to-end testing, showcasing its effectiveness.
